notes: Send all 6 starting villagers to sheep and keep making villagers nonstop.
Scout for sheep, gold veins, and your opponent.
Put 3 villagers on wood and build a Lumber Camp.
Build a House and start a Cattle economy — grow cattle at a Cattle Ranch for flexible food.
Keep most villagers on food and add a Mill on berries.
Build a Pit Mine on a gold vein — it generates passive gold without villagers.
A couple of villagers on gold plus the Pit Mine income adds up fast.
With about 400 food and 200 wood, age up to Feudal (Saharan Trade Network for economy).
Keep gathering through the age-up; your passive gold means you can lean harder on food and wood.
Scout whether the enemy can punish your greedy economy.
In Feudal, make Donso (javelin/spear infantry) and Musofadi Warriors (stealth) for cheap, mobile pressure.
Use stealth infantry to sneak in and snipe villagers.
Raid with mobile infantry while your passive economy snowballs at home.
Add a second Pit Mine if you control another gold vein.
Protect your Pit Mines and cattle — losing them removes your snowball.
Bank toward Castle Age for a power spike.
In Castle Age, add Sofa (cavalry) and the Farimba Garrison buff, with Javelin Throwers and siege support.
Turn your passive-gold lead into a relentless, cost-efficient army.
